result.markdown:
--- title: "India GST Collection Analysis" subtitle: "Interactive Dashboard — Financial Years 2017–18 to 2024–25" author: "GST Analytics" date: "2026-04-13" date-modified: last-modified format: html: theme: - cosmo - custom.scss # optional — drop if not using Sass overrides toc: true toc-depth: 3 toc-title: "Contents" toc-location: left number-sections: false smooth-scroll: true code-fold: true code-tools: true code-summary: "Show code" fig-width: 11 fig-height: 6 fig-align: center embed-resources: true # single self-contained HTML file page-layout: full df-print: paged execute: echo: true warning: false message: false cache: false knitr: opts_chunk: comment: "#>" --- ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} gst_data <- fread("/home/pawan/tax/gst.csv") num_cols <- c("CGST", "SGST", "IGST", "CESS", "TOTAL") gst_data[, (num_cols) := lapply(.SD, function(x) as.numeric(gsub(",", "", x))), .SDcols = num_cols] latest_year <- gst_data[!is.na(TOTAL) & TOTAL > 0, max(Year)] exclude_rows <- c("Domestic GST Collection- All India", "Gross Revenue", "IGST and CESS on Import - All India") ``` ::: ## Overview This interactive report explores **India's Goods and Services Tax (GST)** collection data across states and financial years. All monetary values are expressed in **₹ Thousands Crores (K Cr)**. > **Tip:** Hover over any chart element to see detailed figures. Use the toolbar icon to download charts as PNG. --- ## 1 · All India Domestic GST Trends {#sec-all-india} Year-wise breakdown of Central (CGST), State (SGST), Integrated (IGST) and Compensation Cess (CESS) for the consolidated All India basket. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} all_india_long <- melt( gst_data[State == "Domestic GST Collection- All India"], id.vars = c("State", "Year"), measure.vars = c("CGST", "SGST", "IGST", "CESS"), variable.name = "Tax_Type", value.name = "Amount" ) all_india_long[, tooltip := paste0( "", Tax_Type, "
Year: ", Year, "
Amount: ", fmt_cr(Amount) )] p1 <- ggplot(all_india_long, aes(x = Year, y = Amount / 1000, fill = Tax_Type, group = Tax_Type)) + geom_bar_interactive( stat = "identity", aes(tooltip = tooltip, data_id = paste(Year, Tax_Type)), width = 0.7, alpha = 0.88 ) + scale_fill_manual(values = gst_colors) + scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma(suffix = " K")) + labs(title = "All India Domestic GST Collection Trends", subtitle = "Year-wise breakdown by tax type (₹ Thousands Crores)", x = "Financial Year", y = "Amount (₹ Thousands Crores)", fill = "Tax Type", caption = "Source: GST Council / Ministry of Finance") + theme_gst() girafe(ggobj = p1, options = girafe_opts("#3B9EE0")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` Stacked bars — hover to inspect individual tax components. ::: ::: --- ## 2 · GST Collection by State {#sec-states} Top 16 states ranked by cumulative GST, broken down by tax type. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} states_dt <- gst_data[!State %in% exclude_rows] top16_names <- states_dt[TOTAL > 0, .(S = sum(TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE)), by = State ][order(-S)][1:16, State] states_long <- melt( states_dt[State %in% top16_names], id.vars = c("State", "Year", "TOTAL"), measure.vars = c("CGST", "SGST", "IGST", "CESS"), variable.name = "Tax_Type", value.name = "Amount" ) states_long[, tooltip := paste0( "", State, "
Year: ", Year, "
", Tax_Type, ": ", fmt_cr(Amount), "
Total: ", fmt_cr(TOTAL) )] p2 <- ggplot(states_long, aes(x = Year, y = Amount / 1000, fill = Tax_Type)) + geom_bar_interactive( stat = "identity", aes(tooltip = tooltip, data_id = paste(State, Year, Tax_Type)), alpha = 0.88 ) + scale_fill_manual(values = gst_colors) + scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) + facet_wrap(~State, scales = "free_y", ncol = 4) + labs(title = "GST Collection by State", subtitle = "Top 16 states — stacked by tax type (₹ Thousands Crores)", x = "Financial Year", y = "Amount (₹ Thousands Crores)", fill = "Tax Type", caption = "Source: GST Council") + theme_gst() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 7)) girafe(ggobj = p2, width_svg = 14, height_svg = 10, options = girafe_opts("#2DBE8E")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` Stacked bars per state — hover to see component amounts. ::: ::: --- ## 3 · Major States — Collection Trends {#sec-major} Line + point chart for 10 major states. Hover a point to see YoY growth. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} major_states <- c("Maharashtra", "Gujarat", "Tamil Nadu", "Karnataka", "Uttar Pradesh", "West Bengal", "Delhi", "Rajasthan", "Madhya Pradesh", "Telangana") state_palette <- c( Maharashtra = "#3B9EE0", Gujarat = "#2DBE8E", `Tamil Nadu` = "#F5A623", Karnataka = "#E05C5C", `Uttar Pradesh` = "#9B6CF5", `West Bengal` = "#F0C060", Delhi = "#60C0F0", Rajasthan = "#E08050", `Madhya Pradesh` = "#70D080", Telangana = "#C070D0" ) major_dt <- gst_data[State %in% major_states & !is.na(TOTAL) & TOTAL > 0 ][order(State, Year)] major_dt[, Growth := round((TOTAL - shift(TOTAL)) / shift(TOTAL) * 100, 1), by = State] major_dt[, tooltip := paste0( "", State, "
Year: ", Year, "
Total: ", fmt_cr(TOTAL), ifelse(!is.na(Growth), paste0("
YoY: ", Growth, "%"), "") )] p3 <- ggplot(major_dt, aes(x = Year, y = TOTAL / 1000, color = State, group = State)) + geom_line_interactive(linewidth = 1.3, aes(tooltip = State, data_id = State)) + geom_point_interactive(size = 2.5, aes(tooltip = tooltip, data_id = paste(State, Year))) + scale_color_manual(values = state_palette) + scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) + facet_wrap(~State, ncol = 5, scales = "free_y") + labs(title = "GST Collection Trends — Major States", subtitle = "Hover a point to see YoY growth (₹ Thousands Crores)", x = "Financial Year", y = "Total GST (₹ Thousands Crores)", caption = "Source: GST Council") + theme_gst() + theme(legend.position = "none") girafe(ggobj = p3, width_svg = 14, height_svg = 7, options = girafe_opts("#F5A623")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` Each panel is one state; hover points reveal YoY growth %. ::: ::: --- ## 4 · GST Composition — 2025-26 {#sec-composition} Donut showing the share of each tax head for the latest available financial year across all states. ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} latest_comp <- gst_data[!State %in% exclude_rows & Year == latest_year, .(CGST = sum(CGST, na.rm = TRUE), SGST = sum(SGST, na.rm = TRUE), IGST = sum(IGST, na.rm = TRUE), CESS = sum(CESS, na.rm = TRUE))] comp_long <- melt(latest_comp, measure.vars = c("CGST", "SGST", "IGST", "CESS"), variable.name = "Tax_Type", value.name = "Amount") comp_long[, Share := round(Amount / sum(Amount) * 100, 1)] comp_long[, tooltip := paste0( "", Tax_Type, "
", fmt_cr(Amount), "
Share: ", Share, "%" )] p4 <- ggplot(comp_long, aes(x = "", y = Amount / 1000, fill = Tax_Type)) + geom_bar_interactive( stat = "identity", width = 1, aes(tooltip = tooltip, data_id = as.character(Tax_Type)), color = "#0F1923", linewidth = 1.2 ) + coord_polar("y", start = 0) + geom_text(aes(label = paste0(Tax_Type, "\n", Share, "%")), position = position_stack(vjust = 0.55), color = "white", size = 4.2, fontface = "bold") + scale_fill_manual(values = gst_colors) + labs(title = paste0("GST Composition — All States (", latest_year, ")"), subtitle = "Distribution across tax types", fill = "Tax Type", caption = "Source: GST Council") + theme_gst() + theme(axis.title = element_blank(), axis.text = element_blank(), panel.grid = element_blank()) girafe(ggobj = p4, options = girafe_opts("#9B6CF5")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` Hover a segment to see the exact amount and share. ::: ::: --- ## 5 · Heatmap — State × Year {#sec-heatmap} ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} heatmap_dt <- gst_data[ !State %in% c(exclude_rows, "OIDAR", "Other Territory") & TOTAL > 0, .(State, Year, TOTAL) ] top20 <- heatmap_dt[, .(S = sum(TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE)), by = State ][order(-S)][1:20, State] heatmap_dt <- heatmap_dt[State %in% top20] heatmap_dt[, tooltip := paste0( "", State, "
Year: ", Year, "
Total: ", fmt_cr(TOTAL) )] p5 <- ggplot(heatmap_dt, aes(x = Year, y = reorder(State, TOTAL, FUN = sum), fill = TOTAL / 1000)) + geom_tile_interactive( aes(tooltip = tooltip, data_id = paste(State, Year)), color = "#0F1923", linewidth = 0.4 ) + scale_fill_gradient2( low = "#0D2137", mid = "#1E6FAD", high = "#FFD166", midpoint = median(heatmap_dt$TOTAL / 1000, na.rm = TRUE), name = "₹ K Crores", labels = label_comma() ) + labs(title = "Heatmap — GST Collections by State & Year", subtitle = "Top 20 States/UTs (₹ Thousands Crores)", x = "Financial Year", y = NULL, caption = "Source: GST Council") + theme_gst() + theme(legend.position = "right", axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9)) girafe(ggobj = p5, width_svg = 12, height_svg = 7, options = girafe_opts("#FFD166")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` Top 20 states by cumulative GST; brighter = higher collection. ::: ::: --- ## 6 · YoY Growth Rate — All India {#sec-growth} ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} growth_dt <- gst_data[ State == "Domestic GST Collection- All India" & !is.na(TOTAL) & TOTAL > 0 ][order(Year)] growth_dt[, Growth_Rate := round((TOTAL - shift(TOTAL)) / shift(TOTAL) * 100, 1)] growth_dt[, tooltip := paste0( "", Year, "
Growth: ", ifelse(!is.na(Growth_Rate), paste0(Growth_Rate, "%"), "N/A"), "
Total: ", fmt_cr(TOTAL) )] growth_dt[, bar_fill := ifelse(Growth_Rate >= 0, "Positive", "Negative")] p6 <- ggplot(growth_dt[!is.na(Growth_Rate)], aes(x = Year, y = Growth_Rate, fill = bar_fill)) + geom_bar_interactive( stat = "identity", width = 0.65, alpha = 0.88, aes(tooltip = tooltip, data_id = Year) ) + geom_hline(yintercept = 0, color = "#8FA8C8", linewidth = 0.6) + geom_text( aes(label = paste0(Growth_Rate, "%"), vjust = ifelse(Growth_Rate >= 0, -0.4, 1.4)), color = "#C8DCEF", size = 3.5, fontface = "bold" ) + scale_fill_manual(values = c(Positive = "#2DBE8E", Negative = "#E05C5C"), guide = "none") + scale_y_continuous(labels = label_percent(scale = 1)) + labs(title = "All India Domestic GST — YoY Growth Rate", subtitle = "Percentage change from previous financial year", x = "Financial Year", y = "Growth Rate (%)", caption = "Source: GST Council") + theme_gst() girafe(ggobj = p6, options = girafe_opts("#2DBE8E")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` Green = positive growth; red = contraction. ::: ::: --- ## 7 · CGST vs SGST — Selected States {#sec-cgst-sgst} ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} comp_data <- gst_data[State %in% c("Maharashtra", "Gujarat", "Tamil Nadu", "Karnataka") & Year >= "2019-20"] comp_long2 <- melt(comp_data, id.vars = c("State", "Year"), measure.vars = c("CGST", "SGST"), variable.name = "Tax_Type", value.name = "Amount") comp_long2[, tooltip := paste0( "", State, "
Year: ", Year, "
", Tax_Type, ": ", fmt_cr(Amount) )] p7 <- ggplot(comp_long2, aes(x = Year, y = Amount / 1000, fill = Tax_Type)) + geom_bar_interactive( stat = "identity", position = "dodge", width = 0.7, alpha = 0.88, aes(tooltip = tooltip, data_id = paste(State, Year, Tax_Type)) ) + scale_fill_manual(values = c(CGST = "#3B9EE0", SGST = "#2DBE8E")) + scale_y_continuous(labels = label_comma()) + facet_wrap(~State, scales = "free_y") + labs(title = "CGST vs SGST — Major States", subtitle = "Central vs State GST since 2019-20 (₹ Thousands Crores)", x = "Financial Year", y = "Amount (₹ Thousands Crores)", fill = "Tax Type", caption = "Source: GST Council") + theme_gst() girafe(ggobj = p7, width_svg = 11, height_svg = 7, options = girafe_opts("#3B9EE0")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` Dodged bars — CGST and SGST compared side by side. ::: ::: --- ## 8 · CESS Contribution Trend {#sec-cess} ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} cess_dt <- gst_data[!State %in% exclude_rows & TOTAL > 0, .(CESS_Share = round( sum(CESS, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE) * 100, 2)), by = Year][order(Year)] cess_dt[, tooltip := paste0( "", Year, "
CESS Share: ", CESS_Share, "%" )] p8 <- ggplot(cess_dt, aes(x = Year, y = CESS_Share, group = 1)) + geom_line_interactive( color = "#F5A623", linewidth = 1.4, aes(tooltip = "CESS trend", data_id = "line") ) + geom_point_interactive( color = "#E05C5C", size = 4, alpha = 0.9, aes(tooltip = tooltip, data_id = Year) ) + geom_text(aes(label = paste0(CESS_Share, "%")), vjust = -1, color = "#C8DCEF", size = 3.5) + scale_y_continuous( labels = label_percent(scale = 1), limits = c(0, max(cess_dt$CESS_Share, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.3) ) + labs(title = "CESS Contribution to Total GST", subtitle = "Percentage share of CESS across all states, by year", x = "Financial Year", y = "CESS Share (%)", caption = "Source: GST Council") + theme_gst() girafe(ggobj = p8, options = girafe_opts("#F5A623")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ```{=html}
``` Hover points to see exact CESS share per year. ::: ::: --- ## 9 · Statistical Summary Tables {#sec-tables} ### Top 15 States by Average GST Collection ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} state_avg <- gst_data[ !State %in% c(exclude_rows, "OIDAR", "Other Territory") & TOTAL > 0, .( `Avg (₹ K Cr)` = round(mean(TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE) / 1000, 2), `Max (₹ K Cr)` = round(max(TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE) / 1000, 2), `Min (₹ K Cr)` = round(min(TOTAL, na.rm = TRUE) / 1000, 2) ), by = State ][order(-`Avg (₹ K Cr)`)][1:15] knitr::kable(state_avg, format.args = list(big.mark = ",")) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} |State | Avg (₹ K Cr)| Max (₹ K Cr)| Min (₹ K Cr)| |:--------------|------------:|------------:|------------:| |Maharashtra | 235.99| 359.86| 105.19| |Karnataka | 106.03| 159.56| 48.14| |Gujarat | 96.57| 136.75| 45.91| |Tamil Nadu | 91.22| 131.12| 45.32| |Haryana | 77.04| 119.36| 36.81| |Uttar Pradesh | 76.61| 112.21| 36.86| |Delhi | 51.85| 77.00| 26.44| |West Bengal | 49.02| 66.89| 23.33| |Telangana | 45.42| 62.99| 21.35| |Odisha | 39.68| 60.93| 14.85| |Rajasthan | 39.07| 54.78| 18.46| |Andhra Pradesh | 32.62| 44.83| 14.33| |Madhya Pradesh | 31.85| 45.07| 15.54| |Chhattisgarh | 27.27| 37.18| 13.01| |Jharkhand | 26.62| 36.84| 14.16| ::: ::: ### Top 10 Growth Leaders (2023-24 → 2024-25) ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} growth_by_state <- gst_data[ !State %in% c(exclude_rows, "OIDAR", "Other Territory") & Year %in% c("2023-24", "2024-25") & TOTAL > 0 ] growth_wide <- dcast(growth_by_state, State ~ Year, value.var = "TOTAL") growth_wide[, `Growth (%)` := round((`2024-25` - `2023-24`) / `2023-24` * 100, 2)] knitr::kable( growth_wide[order(-`Growth (%)`)][1:10, .(State, `2023-24 (₹ Cr)` = `2023-24`, `2024-25 (₹ Cr)` = `2024-25`, `Growth (%)`)], format.args = list(big.mark = ",") ) ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} |State | 2023-24 (₹ Cr)| 2024-25 (₹ Cr)| Growth (%)| |:--------------------------|--------------:|--------------:|----------:| |Haryana | 102,914| 119,362| 15.98| |Delhi | 66,445| 77,002| 15.89| |Ladakh | 481| 546| 13.51| |Tripura | 1,053| 1,193| 13.30| |Andaman and Nicobar Island | 428| 482| 12.62| |Maharashtra | 320,117| 359,855| 12.41| |Bihar | 18,021| 20,208| 12.14| |Assam | 15,602| 17,415| 11.62| |Odisha | 54,748| 60,928| 11.29| |Punjab | 24,061| 26,721| 11.06| ::: ::: --- ## Session Info {#sec-session} ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code code-fold="true" code-summary="R session info"} sessionInfo() ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout} ``` #> R version 4.5.3 (2026-03-11) #> Platform: x86_64-pc-linux-gnu #> Running under: Manjaro Linux #> #> Matrix products: default #> BLAS: /usr/lib/libblas.so.3.12.0 #> LAPACK: /usr/lib/liblapack.so.3.12.0 LAPACK version 3.12.0 #> #> locale: #> [1] LC_CTYPE=en_US.UTF-8 LC_NUMERIC=C LC_TIME=en_IN #> [4] LC_COLLATE=en_US.UTF-8 LC_MONETARY=en_IN LC_MESSAGES=en_US.UTF-8 #> [7] LC_PAPER=en_IN LC_NAME=C LC_ADDRESS=C #> [10] LC_TELEPHONE=C LC_MEASUREMENT=en_IN LC_IDENTIFICATION=C #> #> time zone: Asia/Kolkata #> tzcode source: system (glibc) #> #> attached base packages: #> [1] stats graphics grDevices utils datasets methods base #> #> other attached packages: #> [1] scales_1.4.0 ggiraph_0.9.2 ggplot2_4.0.1 #> [4] data.table_1.18.2.1 #> #> loaded via a namespace (and not attached): #> [1] gtable_0.3.6 jsonlite_2.0.0 dplyr_1.1.4 #> [4] compiler_4.5.3 tidyselect_1.2.1 Rcpp_1.1.1 tibble_3.3.1 #> [19] pillar_1.11.1 RColorBrewer_1.1-3 rlang_1.2.0 #> [22] xfun_0.55 S7_0.2.1 cli_3.6.6 #> [25] withr_3.0.2 magrittr_2.0.5 digest_0.6.39 #> [28] grid_4.5.3 lifecycle_1.0.5 vctrs_0.7.3
